center.name: 玻利瓦尔省 (哥伦比亚)
center.summary: 玻利瓦尔省 (哥伦比亚)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括鳞胸刀翅蜂鸟、Turquoise-winged parrotlet、One-colored becard等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: quimarinus is found in the northwestern Colombian departments of Antioquia, Bolívar, and Magdalena. P

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Panama from eastern Panamá Province through Darién Province into northwestern Colombia's Córdoba and Bolívar departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: ennosiphyllus is found in northern Colombia between Antioquia and Bolívar departments. The scaly-throated leaftosser inhabits humid lowland evergreen forest, favoring primary forest with little undergrowth under a closed canopy

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Turquoise-winged parrotlets are found in northern Colombia from the Caribbean coastal region southwest of the Santa Marta Mountains, Atlantico, and south along the Rio Magdalena in Bolívar and Cesar. Turquoise-winged parrotlets are most often found in drier, open or riparian woodlands, cerrado, caatinga, savanna, palm groves, semi-arid scrubland, and pastures

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: cordobae: northern Colombia's Córdoba, Antioquia, Bolívar, Santander, and Boyacá departments The western woodhaunter inhabits humid forest and woodlands in foothills and the lower montane zone

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: berlepschi, northern Colombia's Atlántico and Bolívar departments The scaly-breasted hummingbird inhabits a variety of semi-open to open landscapes including dry forest, edges and clearings of gallery and humid forest, mangroves, secondary forest, scrublands, and gardens
